title: VulnScout: Imbalance-aware source code vulnerability detection using pretrained code models and Deep Neural Network
data:
MF Ullah, MU Khan, A Saeed, SU Khan, M Ishtiaq- Information and Software, 2026
Context: The deploying automated vulnerability detectors for source code in practical 
settings is hindered by key challenges including severe class imbalance, domain 
shift, and limited generalization across real-world benchmarks. Objective: This study
author: Thanh Le-Cong

title: Evaluating LLMs for Explaining Insecure Code and Identifying Vulnerabilities in Java and Python
data:
A Mahmud, Y Rawajfih, F Wu- World Congress in Computer Science, Computer, 2026
This study evaluates how accurately four large language models (GPT-4, Claude, 
Gemini, and DeepSeek) explain insecure Java and Python code and identify security 
vulnerabilities. Using a dataset of 211 code samples spanning 25 CWE categories
